description: Starter historical YES/NO gold set for regression testing research quality against obvious resolved Polymarket markets.

cases.notes: Joe Biden did not publicly announce a positive COVID-19 test before the 2020 U.S. election.
Airbnb began public trading on Nasdaq on December 10, 2020.
Amy Coney Barrett was confirmed on October 26, 2020.
Kim Kardashian filed for divorce in February 2021, after the market deadline.
Coinbase began public trading in April 2021, after the market deadline.
No COVID-19 vaccine EUA was granted before November 3, 2020.
Drake did not release a new studio album before the end of 2020.
No federal charge was filed against Hunter Biden before 2021.
Khabib Nurmagomedov defeated Justin Gaethje at UFC 254.
